reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games ever
reviews.review_description:
Meta NEEDS to put this game back on the store. Its far superior than almost if not all other games on the Meta Horizon store. 

There is no other game like it, which is nonsense considering horde shooters are arcade classics.
Used to love this game but know it’s gone forever. Drink piss meta
Give us the game bk

meta first party games like this and far too many others that were released, people loved them, and then they just shut them down after they got their money. This and the continued s***tification of every meta vr product and service is why, once steam releases it's own self contained vr system, meta will be forgotten by everyone, and the company will die along with the last boomer who uses it.

congratulations facebook for working so hard to take a once great product and making it worse and worse every day. 

never has a company squandered soo much potential.

D&B2 is one of the best games out there for the 40+ crowd. Most of the players are adults , retirees, and seniors. For them this game is a great form of exercise while they just have fun. The game has some issues, but overall it is great. There is no other game like it or as easy to play. All the other games are flooded with kids and crazies. META - Do the world a good thing and keep the game and put it back in the store. Show the world you care even a little for the seniors. Don't do this as it could tarnish your already bad reputation even more.

reviews.review_title: * One Of The All Time Best Games in VR!
reviews.review_description:
I'm sad to see you go old friend! You've been like a second home to many of us. You provided a place for many people to gather on an almost daily basis. Many friendships were made & many lives we're lost 🤠 I personally probably spent thousands of hours enjoying your games. 

None of us that consistently play this game can understand why Meta would get rid of such an awesome game... I'm sure this was one of my first 5 games when I bought the Oculus Quest 1, five years ago. I own around 70+ games now and it's still the one game I spend the most time in. I know many other players are the same way. $20 is nothing for this game, it's ridiculous that anyone would ask for a refund that's spent more than a few hours enjoying it.  I'll miss the Beauty of all the rooms and the hilarious banter amongst the players...  I'd like to give a huge THANK YOU to all the developers for their hard work creating Dead & Buried 2, It will definitely be missed! VR will never be the same without it! (Meta doesn't' realize what a gem they have!)

reviews.review_title: Am I able to get my money back?
reviews.review_description: I bought this game all the way back in 2019. Since the game would not be available on March 15 2024. Can I get my money back please?

Bought a game and now being told I can't play it after march, this is terrible customer service.
How do I get a refund or store credit not happy.
Since this game will no longer be available March 15th 2024,people who paid for it should get a refund or store credit at the very least.
I agree with stealth54, we should get a refund since the app is ending and no longer available.

This game is incredible. It’s already improved over the last few days, and I’m eagerly awaiting the stuff that’s due to be added soon. The fact that voice chat is utterly erratic at the moment needs fixing immediately (this is annoying) but the gameplay is so immediate and satisfying that it’s hard to love even in its slightly basic current state. Addictive and brilliant.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice comments. We are looking into the voice chat issue.

reviews.review_description: Waste of money. Worst game I have on quest. You cannot move around and kill people. You are spawned to a single spot and have to hide behind a single item like a box while you get killed over and over. Played it for 5 minutes and will never play again.

developer_response.body: Sorry you had a poor initial experience.  Sounds like you were playing the Shootout mode, which is a stationary mode.  I recommend trying Deathmatch, which has free movement.  We just released an update and hope you give the game another chance.

reviews.review_description: , I had to disable free loco so I cannot play certain levels

developer_response.body: We will be adding more movement options in an update. I hope you can find something that fits your comfort level and play some deathmatch!

reviews.review_description: I've never felt so sick on a vr game until I played this one it's so bad for motion sickness the game is good itself but not as great as a thought it would be and the graphics are not great especially if your looking at something a bit further away could be better in my opinion

developer_response.body: We will be adding more comfort and movement options in a future update.

reviews.review_description: The shootout mode is my favorite quest experience so far. Have a large playing space and get ready to have a blast. Using the cover like in real life is so much fun. Keep it up! Hopefully we get more game modes and player progression levels in the future!
Would be nice to try the game, but it’s stuck on the loading screen. Waste of $ so far

developer_response.body: Please try again, there may have been a network issue or you may have run into a Oculus system wide issue with games not loading.  We recommend reinstalling the app if you have this problem.  If you keep running into problems you can contact us on our discord: http://ocul.us/dabdiscord

reviews.review_description: Missions full and have to wait in line? Can’t figure out how to move around. Got stuck in the options menu and couldn’t get out without reloading game. No tutorial or introductory level. Seems kinda half baked. Requesting a refund on that one before I play too long to qualify for it.

developer_response.body: Hi, we just released an update that adds a new Tutorial with a simple Shooting Range.  Check out our Release Notes and we hope you give the game another chance!

reviews.review_description: Had a blast playing shootout and meeting new people. The snap turning does make me queasy in The open world and when walking up/downstairs even in comfort mode but I think that has to do with me being new to VR. Thanks for the amazing product!

developer_response.body: Great to hear! We will be adding more comfort and movement options in a  future update.

reviews.review_description: I love this game it is really fun but there is not enough variety of types of games and weapons. There is only deathmatch and shootout for game modes and for guns (not including what you pick up in game) you have two pistols. I honestly think there should be more added to this game.
The old reviews put me off buying this but took a leap of faith and WOW!
